scroll_found.title: Research the Dacxirons scroll at a Research Pedestal

arcane_book.title: Obtain an Arcane Tome from an ISS Wizard — the rare drop that contains bonus spell recipes

subtitle.text: The ISS Wizards carry something the Arcane Shrines don't. Farm them alongside the Eye Hunt. They share a hunt.

description: CH.09 · THE DACXIRONS
▸ The Dacxirons scroll is the art of dark fire.
It comes from the ISS Wizards —
the wandering mage enemies that spawn
in strongholds and magical structures.
They carry T.O Magic 'n Extras recipes.
You cannot get those elsewhere.
◈ T.O MAGIC 'N EXTRAS (traveloptics:)
└ This is an ISS addon — NOT a travel mod
despite the namespace name
└ Adds school-specific items that boost
individual ISS schools beyond base capability
└ Items include: extra reagents, school-specific
wands, ritual components, mana storage variants
└ All T.O. recipes are in the Dacxirons scroll
— they do not appear in base JEI ISS tabs
└ Check JEI under traveloptics: namespace after
researching the scroll for full item list
◈ ISS WIZARD FARMING
└ ISS Wizards spawn in: Wizard Towers,
stronghold-adjacent structures, dungeon complexes
└ Drops: ISS Scrolls, Arcane Scrolls, mana items,
school-specific loot, Dacxirons scroll (12%)
└ Fight: ranged magic, shield burst, teleport
— bring high-mobility build or ranged weapon
└ Looting III increases drop rate meaningfully
◈ MANA CAPACITY NOTE
└ T.O. items can increase effective mana pool
└ Priority upgrade before attempting Level III
spells in Evocation, Holy, or Eldritch
└ Mana regeneration: ISS-specific gear + Puffish
Skills mage track + research bonuses from scrolls
◈ SCROLL: The Dacxirons
└ 12% drop from any irons_spellbooks: mob
└ Research time: 30 min
└ Unlocks: T.O. Magic 'n Extras full recipe list,
advanced ISS school items, dark fire school lore
▸ The Wizards learned from something older than schools.
The scroll calls it the Dacxirons.
The name is not in any other record.
Neither is what the Dacxirons was.
▶ Find The Dacxirons scroll [check]
▶ Obtain an Arcane Tome from an ISS Wizard [check]
◇ Farm ISS Wizards during the Eye Hunt.
The same areas contain Eye drops and Wizard spawns.
One farm covers both objectives.
